title: Middle-earth: The Return of the King
description: Context-gated War of the Ring lore for The Return of the King book arc, including Gondor, Rohan, Pelennor, Mordor, Mount Doom, Sauron's fall, Scouring of the Shire, and the Grey Havens.
author: Saga

cover.alt: Deck cover for Middle-earth: The Return of the King

banner.alt: Wide banner for Middle-earth: The Return of the King

continuity.sourceBoundary: The Return of the King novel within The Lord of the Rings, including the book aftermath and Scouring of the Shire.
continuity.notes: Book continuity. Does not include Peter Jackson film-only omissions or additions as default canon.

sagaReview.notes: Automated structural and editorial revision pass; still requires in-app Deck Health and human canon review before reference release.

sagaRevision.notes: Volume-density pass kept the three LOTR volume decks and added scene-state, culture, route, and knowledge-boundary Lorecards.

health.notes: Local v8 smoke validation passed; run in-app Saga Deck Health and human canon review before reference release.

dependencies.reason: The Return of the King deck is designed to stack with Middle-earth: Core for broad world rules, Ring mechanics, peoples, geography, and shared entity/tag semantics.
